description: Chemistry and molecular analysis using RDKit, Cantera, and PySCF. Covers molecular structure analysis, reaction modeling, combustion, and quantum chemistry calculations.
use_cases: Analyze molecular structure and compute fingerprints
Calculate quantum chemistry properties of a molecule
Parse and simulate a chemical reaction network
example_prompts: Find the molecular fingerprint for the SMILES string CCO
Simulate the combustion of methane with air
Compute the ground state energy of water using PySCF
